planet of
activity, the native will have a good fortune if he works for it. The Moon and
the Sun are within the nodes Rahu and Ketu. So the native will have little help
from his parents or brothers.
There are no planets in the second house from Mercury and
Venus. As we proceed further, we find Ketu and Mars. This indicates
that the native will be educated moderately. He will be able to please
others by his talents.
The native will be travelling around the country till his 27th
year. During his 28th year, he will get some help from his father. This
would lead to the native's getting married before his 30th year. His wife
will be quite intelligent. But, the native will not be entirely happy with

168 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
his wife. Between the native's 31st and 36th year, children will be born.
Between his 40th and 43rd year, his parents will die.
Between his 42nd and 44th year, the native's monetary position will
improve and his wife will acquire a house.
